admin_list_hint: {e_menu_default} marks your default menu — it opens automatically when a subscriber types /start.
admin_no_menus: {e_info} No menus yet. Menus let your subscribers navigate your bot with one tap. Each menu has a name, buttons, and an optional command trigger (e.g. /products). Tap Create to build your first one.
admin_settings_title:
{e_settings} Button Advanced Settings
What each option does: {e_analytics} Clicks — total taps and taps this week. This is read-only — tap it to dismiss. {e_help} Require Confirmation — when ON, subscribers see a confirmation prompt before the action fires. Useful for purchases, unsubscribes, or any irreversible action. {e_broadcast} Notify on Tap — when ON, you receive a private Telegram message each time a subscriber taps this button. Requires Basic plan. {e_lightning} Streaming Mode — when ON, the bot's reply appears word-by-word (live typing effect). Only works on Send Message buttons. Requires Advanced plan. {e_stopwatch} Cooldown — limits how often the same subscriber can tap this button. Set to 0 to disable. Prevents spam or repeated purchases. Requires Advanced plan. {e_lightning} Quick Replies — adds suggested reply chips after this button's message so subscribers can respond with one tap. Only available on Send Message buttons. {e_tag} On-Click Tag Effects — automatically add or remove subscriber tags whenever this button is tapped. Use this to segment your audience based on what they interact with.
admin_title: {e_menu} Button Menus Send subscribers interactive menus with tap-to-respond buttons. Buttons can open messages, URLs, forms, sequences, and more.
cmd_set_title: {e_menu} Command Set Subscribers can now type {command} to open this menu.
cmd_too_long: {e_warning} Command too long — keep it under 100 characters.
confirm_action_prompt: Are you sure you want to proceed?
cooldown_prompt_msg:
Enter the cooldown in seconds.

Subscribers must wait this long before tapping the button again. Send 0 to disable.
cooldown_upgrade_toast:
⏲️ Button Cooldown — Advanced Plan

Limit how often a subscriber can tap this button. Requires Advanced plan.

Advanced also unlocks streaming mode, conditional visibility, and persistent keyboards.
create_cmd_prompt:
{e_menu} Create New Menu Step 3/3: Set a command trigger Menu: {name} A command lets subscribers open this menu by typing it directly — e.g. typing /products opens your products menu instantly.
Rules: • Must start with / • Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only • Examples: /menu /products /support /help
Send a command, or /skip to skip this step:
create_desc_prompt:
{e_menu} Create New Menu Step 2/3: Add a description Menu: {name} The description appears as text above your buttons when the menu opens. Use it to give subscribers context — e.g. "Choose a category below."
Keep it short (1–2 lines). Bold and italic formatting is supported.
Send a description, or /skip to leave it empty:
create_title:
{e_menu} Create New Menu Step 1/3: What should this menu be called? The name is for your reference only — subscribers never see it.
Examples: Main Menu · Products · Services · Support · Help Centre
Send the menu name now:
delete_title: {e_delete} Delete Menu? Are you sure you want to delete: {name} This menu has {count} button(s).
desc_too_long: {e_warning} Description too long — keep it under 500 characters.
edit_desc_title2: {e_menu} Edit Menu Description Current description: {desc} The description appears as text above your buttons when the menu opens. Send the new description, or /skip to remove it:
edit_name_title: {e_menu} Rename Menu Current name: {name} The name is for your reference only — subscribers never see it. Send the new name:
edit_title:
{e_menu} Edit Menu: {name}
Tap any button below to edit it. Use the Settings button to change the menu name, description, or command trigger.
menu_locked_upgrade:
{e_locked} Menu Locked This menu was created while you had a higher-tier plan. Your data is safe — renew your plan to access it again.
Basic unlocks 5 menus · Advanced unlocks 20 · Business unlocks unlimited.
name_too_long: {e_warning} Name too long — keep it under 100 characters.
name_too_short: {e_warning} Name too short — please use at least 2 characters.
name_too_short_create: {e_warning} Name too short — please use at least 2 characters.
no_send_rights_warning_msg:
Action needed: Your bot doesn't have permission to send media in this chat.

To fix this, open your group settings → Administrators → find your bot → enable Send Messages and Send Media.
notify_upgrade_toast:
📣 Owner Notifications — Basic Plan

Get a DM when a subscriber taps this button. Requires Basic plan.

Basic also unlocks reply keyboards, reaction analytics, and up to 5 keyword triggers.
payment_invoice_error: Could not create invoice. Please try again.
payment_success_msg_prompt_msg:
{e_response} Success message

Enter the message to send after payment is confirmed. You can use macros like %first_name%.

Tap Skip to use the default confirmation.
reply_persistent_upgrade_toast:
📌 Always-Visible Keyboard — Advanced Plan

Keep the keyboard pinned at all times (persistent mode). Requires Advanced plan.

Also unlocks streaming mode, button cooldowns, and conditional buttons.
sequence_enrolled: {e_success} You've been enrolled in this sequence.
sequence_reenrolled: {e_success} You've been re-enrolled in this sequence.
set_cmd_title:
{e_menu} Set Command Trigger Current command: {command} A command lets subscribers open this menu directly — e.g. /products.
Rules: • Must start with / • Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only • Examples: /menu /products /support /help
Send a command, or /skip to remove it:
settings_prompt: What would you like to change?
settings_title:
{e_settings} Menu Settings — {name}
Manage this menu's identity and behaviour. • {e_edit} Edit Name — the internal label subscribers never see • {e_edit} Edit Description — text shown above buttons when the menu opens • {e_commands} Set Command — add a /trigger so subscribers can open it directly • {e_commands} Keyboard Mode — inline buttons under messages, or a reply keyboard at the bottom • {e_auto_back} Auto-back — re-send this menu after every button tap • {e_target} Visibility Conditions — control which subscribers can see this menu
state_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
state_error_toast: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
streaming_upgrade_toast:
⚡ Streaming Mode — Advanced Plan

Word-by-word message delivery requires Advanced plan.

Advanced also unlocks button cooldowns, conditional buttons, persistent keyboards, and drip sequences.
template_placeholder_post: {e_pin} {label} Edit this message in the button settings.
upgrade_prompt:
{e_premium} Menu Limit Reached You have used all the menu slots on your current plan.
Basic unlocks 5 menus with 10 buttons each · Advanced unlocks 20 menus · Business unlocks unlimited menus.
upgrade_prompt_msg:
{e_premium} Menu Limit Reached

You have used all the menu slots on your current plan.

Basic unlocks 5 menus with 10 buttons each · Advanced unlocks 20 menus · Business unlocks unlimited menus.
withdraw_amount_invalid: Invalid amount. Enter a number between {min_amount} and {balance}.
withdraw_balance_prompt:
Your balance: {balance} {currency}

Enter amount to withdraw (min {min_amount}):
withdraw_failed: Withdrawal failed. Please try again later.
